zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Page於1593年5月20日出生在英國素福爾可英厄姆時，他的父親John Page27歲，母親Phyllis Webb23歲。他於大約1612年與Susanna Payne在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德結婚。他們至少是14個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1637年6月在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍斯亞德享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可聖 艾德蒙斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Page于1593年5月20日出生在英国素福爾可英厄姆时，他的父亲John Page27岁，母亲Phyllis Webb23岁。他于大约1612年与Susanna Payne在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德结婚。他们至少是14个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1637年6月在英国英格兰素福爾可霍斯亞德享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可聖 艾德蒙斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Page
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: occupational or status name for a young servant, Middle English page, paige, Old French page (from Italian paggio, ultimately from Greek paidion, a diminutive of pais ‘boy, child’). The surname has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century. In North America, this surname is also a shortened form of the French cognate Lepage .
French Canadian (Pagé): altered form of French Paget , a diminutive of 1. Compare Pashia .
North German: metonymic occupational name for a horse dealer, from Middle Low German page ‘horse’.

variants.name: Pages
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Mario, Eduardo, Jorge, Luis, Mauricio, Ramon, Fernando, Jose, Lazaro, Pedro, Alfredo.  French Jacques, Lucien, Michel.

Catalan and southern French (Pagès): occupational name for a peasant farmer or agricultural laborer, from Catalan and Old Occitan pagès ‘peasant’ (from Late Latin pagensis, a derivative of pagus ‘village, country district’).
English: variant of Page with genitival of post-medieval excrescent s.

variants.name: Pageau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Stephane, Alphonse, Andre, Fernand, Gisele, Jean Claude, Lucien, Philippe.

variants.name: Lepage
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Fernand, Pierre, Raoul, Adelard, Alcide, Christophe, Lucien, Normand, Adrien.
French: occupational or status name for a young servant, a variant of Page 1, with fused masculine definite article le. Compare Lapage .
French Canadian: altered form of Pagé (see Page 2).

variants.name: Padgett
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): from a Middle English diminutive of page, paige ‘servant, groom’ (see Page ).

variants.name: Littlepage
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English littel ‘small’ +Middle English, Old French page ‘young servant’ (see Page ).

variants.name: Pashia
meanings: Americanized form of French Canadian Pagé (see Page 2).
History: It was Jean Baptiste Pagé from QC whose surname was changed to Pashia after he settled in MO in the 1810s. Some of his descendants bear a rare variant, Pashea.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Page was born on 20 May 1593, in Ingham, Suffolk, England, his father, John Page, was 27 and his mother, Phyllis Webb, was 23. He married Susanna Payne about 1612, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 14 sons and 10 daughters. He died in June 1637, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Page est né le 20 mai 1593, à Ingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Page, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Phyllis Webb, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Payne environ 1612, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 14 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé en juin 1637, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Page am 20. Mai 1593 in Ingham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Page 27 und seine Mutter Phyllis Webb 23. Er hat um 1612 in Hawstead, Suffolk, England Susanna Payne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 14 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb im Juni 1637 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Susanna Payne circa 1612, nel Hawstead, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 14 figli e 10 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1637, nel Hawstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Pageが1593年5月20日にイギリススフォルクインガムで生まれた時，父John Pageは27歳，母Phyllis Webbは23歳であった。約1612年にイギリススフォルクハウステアドでSusanna Payneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも14人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年6月にイギリスイギリススフォルクハウステアドで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクサイント エドムンドスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Page(이)가 1593년 5월 20일 영국 수폴크 잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Page(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Phyllis Webb(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1612년 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에서 Susanna Payne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1637년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호스테아드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 세인트 에드먼드스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Page nasceu em 20 de maio de 1593, em Ingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Page, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Phyllis Webb, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Payne aproximadamente 1612, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 14 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em junho de 1637, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Page родился 20 мая 1593 г. в местности ингхам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Page было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Phyllis Webb, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Payne около 1612 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Он умер июнь 1637 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт эдмундсбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Susanna Payne aproximadamente 1612, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 14 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió en junio de 1637, en Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Edmundsbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
